text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara and Rice Shower are chosen for an
"Umamusume Friends" special report.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Can you tell me about a time that left an
impression on the two of you?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Impression? You mean like something surprising?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I'm surprised by her every day... I can't
really think of anything specific!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-an impression?! Um... Well I...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Uh, let me rephrase... What's a good memory the
two of you share?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: A memory? But we're always making memories!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um... Uh...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see... Then, that means... you have a lot of
memories together?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This interview isn't going the way the reporter was
hoping.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
How about we take a little break so I can rethink
my approach? I want to get the best take on
these two that I can.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! How were we? Did we do good?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! ♪ Yay! Interviews are tougher than I
thought, but they're so fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Rice, what's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry for being so quiet. We have so many
memories together... But I couldn't talk about any
of them...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was so happy to be picked for the special
feature with you, but I messed it all up...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What?! Don't be silly! I'm super happy as well, you
know!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's like a dream come true to be in a special
feature with you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-but I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, I think of a good way to calm Rice
Shower's nerves and Haru Urara's energy.
choice_data_list: Urge them to go out and play.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Snacks?! Yippee! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is it really okay for me to have some too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara and Rice Shower spend time stuffing
their faces with snacks together.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Phew! That was delicious! I wonder why they taste
better than normal?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
They're probably imbued with a special kind of
magic that creates happy feelings...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That reminds me of that carrot cake we made
before!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
We cast a good luck spell on it, and it came out
sooo good!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That surprised me too! One taste left me so
overjoyed.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Rice, let's make another one!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yes! And we'll enchant it again!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
What a wonderful story! Can you tell me more
about it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The mood is much better when the interview
starts afresh, and the reporter gets more than
enough material for the special feature.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: We can go play? Yay!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Tag, you're it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You gotta try to tag me now!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah! Ah! Slow dooown!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Hold on. That's...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reporter notices the two excitedly running
around and sets up the camera.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Heh, this'll make a nice shot!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I got you! Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahahahaha! You got me! Now for my secret attack... Urara Dash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, the candid video of them
playing about is used in the special feature. It
becomes a big hit among their fans.
